{"society_power": 7.0, "state_power": 8.0, "society_change": 0.5, "state_change": 0.5, "key_event": "Progressive Era: activist state and reform mobilization grow together", "reasoning": "Roosevelt-era regulatory expansion (ICC empowerment, antitrust, federal consumer regulation, new bureaus) markedly strengthened state capacity, while muckraking, labor organizing, and reform associations revived civic countervailing power against concentrated capital\u2014though the Panic of 1907's private resolution and entrenched Jim Crow disenfranchisement kept both gains bounded."}
